company_name: MP Materials DoD price floor / offtake
evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for RARE_METALS_PRICE_FLOOR_OFFTAKE; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: DoD investment, price floor, and offtake are strong Stage 2 ingredients, but the exact July 2025 stage date and price must be backfilled from source data. Sources: round_149.md AP MP Materials Pentagon agreement.

company_name: MP Materials Apple magnet supply chain
evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for RARE_EARTH_MAGNET_SUPPLY_CHAIN; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Apple magnet supply evidence is separate from raw rare-earth price evidence; Green still needs ramp-up, customer qualification, revenue, and FCF. Sources: round_149.md AP MP Materials Apple magnet agreement.

company_name: MP Materials $500M common stock offering after strategic contracts
evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for RARE_EARTH_CAPITAL_RAISE_DILUTION; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Price floor and offtake can be strong Stage 2 evidence, but post-contract capital raise and dilution can turn the case into 4B/dilution watch. Sources: round_149.md Reuters MP Materials $500M offering.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for RARE_METALS_EXPORT_CONTROL_EVENT; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Export controls are macro bottleneck evidence, not company-level Green without production, offtake, and FCF. Sources: round_149.md Reuters rare-earth export controls.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for RARE_METALS_EXPORT_CONTROL_EVENT; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: License delays are useful routing evidence, but they remain event evidence unless a company has production, customer contracts, and price-floor/offtake economics. Sources: round_149.md Reuters rare-earth approval delay.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for COPPER_AI_GRID_STRUCTURAL_DEMAND; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Copper has AI/grid demand evidence, but tariff inventory, mine recovery, and processing input cost must be audited before company-level Green. Sources: round_149.md WSJ copper record high.

company_name: Indonesia nickel HPAL sulfur input cost squeeze
evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for NICKEL_SULFUR_HPAL_INPUT_COST; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Nickel price can rise while HPAL processing economics deteriorate; sulfur and sulfuric acid costs must be audited before any Green interpretation. Sources: round_149.md Reuters sulfur squeeze Indonesian nickel sector.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for PRECIOUS_METALS_SAFE_HAVEN_MINERS; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Gold price, AISC control, and buyback are useful, but this stays cycle/Watch until durability is proven. Sources: round_149.md Reuters Barrick Q1 profit and buyback.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for GOLD_MINER_JURISDICTION_RERATING; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Gold miner rerating can come from safer jurisdiction and M&A scale, but dilution, integration, production, and AISC still need validation. Sources: round_149.md Reuters Equinox Orla gold producer merger.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for GENERAL_TRADING_RESOURCE_INFRA; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Long LNG contract, project stake, and pipeline steel supply make stronger evidence than spot trading exposure. Sources: round_149.md Reuters POSCO Alaska LNG deal.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for REFINING_OIL_SPREAD; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Strong OP recovery remains Watch because refining margin, inventory, and event duration still need validation. Sources: round_149.md Reuters SK Innovation Q1 profit.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for CHEMICAL_SPREAD; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Chemical spread recovery is not structural Green when China/Middle East capacity crushes OP and FCF. Sources: round_149.md Reuters Korean petrochemical oversupply.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for LITHIUM_ESS_DEMAND_CYCLE; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Lithium rebound is not structural Green when mine restarts and EV slowdown can cap prices. Sources: round_149.md Reuters lithium prices after crash.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for IRON_ORE_CHINA_DEMAND_CYCLE; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Large miners can lose capital-return support when commodity price and China demand weaken. Sources: round_149.md FT BHP dividend cut.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for EVENT_PREMIUM_GOVERNANCE_OVERLAY; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Tender-offer price reaction must be separated from durable smelting-margin and FCF rerating. Sources: round_149.md Reuters Korea Zinc tender offer.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for EVENT_PREMIUM_GOVERNANCE_OVERLAY; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Strategic-metal exposure cannot offset governance and capital-structure risk after a tender-offer event. Sources: round_149.md Reuters Korea Zinc share issuance probe.

company_name: International Paper / DS Smith plant divestment
evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for PAPER_PACKAGING_CYCLE; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Packaging consolidation is a Watch case; competition remedies and mature-industry limits cap Green quality. Sources: round_149.md Reuters International Paper DS Smith divestment.

company_name: International Paper / DS Smith consolidation remedy
evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for PACKAGING_CONSOLIDATION_REMEDY; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Packaging M&A can support Stage 2, but competition remedies, divestitures, and mature-industry limits cap Green until realized FCF is visible. Sources: round_149.md packaging consolidation remedy calibration.

evidence_summary: Round149 R4 Loop-9 case for ADVANCED_MATERIAL_SPECULATIVE_THEME; commodity cycle, spread recovery, event premium, and strategic supply-chain rerating remain separated.
notes: Scientific-material themes are Red/Watch before customer validation, revenue recognition, and FCF path exist. Sources: round_149.md advanced material speculative theme note.
